testcase.name: getReportExecutionStatus_shouldReturnExecutionStatus

testcase.name: cancelReportExecution_shouldReturnFalseForCompletedExecution

testcase.name: previewReport_shouldThrowExceptionForInvalidReportType

failure.message: Unexpected exception type thrown, expected: <java.lang.IllegalArgumentException> but was: <java.lang.RuntimeException>

testcase.name: previewReport_shouldReturnPreviewData

error.message: Failed to generate report preview: Query execution failed: Cannot invoke "jakarta.persistence.Query.setParameter(String, Object)" because "query" is null
